name: Alex Rivera
bio: Met during freshman year orientation. We've done several multi-day hikes together and still argue about the best trail snacks.

name: Marcus Chen
bio: Known each other since middle school. Still compete in the gym and grab protein shakes after every workout session.

name: Liam Dubois
bio: Roommate during study abroad in Europe. We've backpacked through several countries and still plan trips whenever possible.

name: Jamal Washington
bio: Bonded over our shared love of indie bands. We go to concerts together and occasionally jam in his garage studio.

name: Rahul Patel
bio: Met in university cricket team. Still play weekend matches and talk strategy over chai.

name: Diego Morales
bio: Colleague who joined the company soccer league with me. We celebrate every goal like it's the World Cup final.

name: Ethan Kim
bio: Online gaming buddy who became a real-life friend. We still squad up every weekend and grab burgers after.

name: Omar Hassan
bio: Neighbor who taught me chess. We have intense matches on the balcony and talk about life between moves.
